title: Stop RFID Inventory or BLE scan
description: Stop RFID inventory, BLE scanning, or both.

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

payload.title: Stop RFID Inventory or BLE scan
payload.description:
Stop RFID inventory, BLE scanning, or both.

The optional `scanType` array controls what is stopped.

Omitting the payload (or `scanType`) stops RFID only — the original default behaviour.

Use ["ble"] to stop only BLE (RFID continues),
["rfid"] to stop only RFID (BLE continues),
or ["ble","rfid"] to stop both.

scanType.description:
The optional `scanType` array controls what is stopped.

Possible values:
- "rfid"
- "ble"

Behaviour:
- Omitted → stops RFID only (default)
- ["ble"] → stops BLE only
- ["rfid"] → stops RFID only
- ["ble","rfid"] → stops both BLE and RFID
